title: Last Bite Best Bite
subtitle: Airport Food MVP Brand Launch | 2023

paragraphs: MVP concept and launch campaign for an airport food brand focused on authentic local cuisine positioned for transit travellers. Developed brand identity, product positioning around 'authentic value,' and local food pop-up activation strategy.
bullets: Named the brand and developed core brand identity for airport food positioning
Positioned the brand around the concept that the last food experience before a journey is often the most memorable
Built pop-up activation concept to test MVP in high-footfall airport environment
Developed authentic local cuisine positioning to differentiate from generic airport food
Designed traveller engagement framework for a high-speed, low-engagement transit environment
Created brand story architecture that transforms routine transit eating into a mini-culinary adventure

campaign.name: Last Bite Best Bite
campaign.objective: Create a memorable airport food brand experience in a high-speed transit environment that transforms routine eating into a culinary moment
campaign.target_audience: Transit travellers at Vietnamese airports seeking authentic local food experiences before or between flights
campaign.insight: The last food experience before a journey carries emotional weight — travellers seek memorable moments to cap their trip. Positioning authentic local cuisine as the 'final highlight' differentiates from generic airport food
strategy: Build brand identity around the 'last bite is the best bite' concept
Pop-up activation in high-footfall airport location to test MVP
Authentic local cuisine positioning as differentiator from standard airport offerings
Traveller engagement framework optimized for short dwell times
Brand story architecture transforming transit eating into mini-culinary adventure

design.layout: Brand concept and MVP case study

summary: 'Last Bite Best Bite' airport food MVP brand concept — brand identity, authentic local cuisine positioning, and pop-up activation strategy targeting transit travellers seeking memorable culinary moments.
